d: Each of Lamentis' apostles targets an enemy and stuns them for [[3.5]]s, prioritizing different frontmost enemies. Lamentis then deals [[600%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies, while the apostles [[reduce the max HP|hpCut]] of the stunned enemies by [[20%]] of Lamentis' initial max HP. After casting this skill, Lamentis and his apostles gain [[60]] ATK SPD for [[10]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[640%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[680%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[720%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[760%]]<ATK>.
Every third normal attack, Lamentis throws an enchanted trident, dealing [[210%]]<ATK> damage plus extra damage equal to [[20%]] of the target's max HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases base damage to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases base damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases base damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Lamentis sacrifices [[5%]] of his max HP to create 2 apostles from nebulae and particles. The apostles last [[12]]s and inherit [[45%]] of Lamentis' ATK and [[80%]] of his HP. They can use normal attacks and Starcrusher, and prioritize attacking Lamentis' current target. Up to [[6]] apostles can exist on the battlefield at the same time.
If an apostle survives until its duration ends, it will merge back into Lamentis, healing him for HP equal to [[80%]] of the actual damage the apostle dealt while it was active.
Increases the ATK percentage inherited by the apostles to [[50%]].
Increases the ATK percentage inherited by the apostles to [[55%]].
Increases the ATK percentage inherited by the apostles to [[60%]].
Lamentis and his apostles gain [[20]] ATK SPD. This ATK SPD bonus increases by [[3]] for each of his apostles present on the battlefield.
Lamentis and his apostles gain [[25]] ATK SPD. This ATK SPD bonus increases by [[4]] for each of his apostles present on the battlefield.
Lamentis and his apostles gain [[30]] ATK SPD. This ATK SPD bonus increases by [[5]] for each of his apostles present on the battlefield.

Every time an apostle uses a normal attack, it gains 1 stack of Growth. Each stack of Growth increases basic stats by [[4%]]. When an apostle's power merges back into Lamentis, Lamentis gains that apostle's Growth. Lamentis can have up to [[20]] stacks of Growth.
Increases the basic stats granted by each stack of Growth to [[5%]].
Increases the basic stats granted by each stack of Growth to [[6%]].

When Lamentis reaches the maximum Growth stacks gained from this skill, he opens his Six Eyes and unlocks his full potential, allowing him to create apostles every [[1]]s at no cost until the apostle limit is reached. While Lamentis' Six Eyes are active, Starcrusher cast by him and his apostles deals [[300%]]<ATK> extra true damage, and the apostles no longer expire. Lamentis also recovers HP equal to [[80%]] of the actual damage dealt by his apostles and gains [[20%]] of the Energy they gain. Upon unlocking his full potential, his next [[6]] normal attacks are replaced by Starcrusher.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 20 Execution.

d: While an apostle has a stat buff from an ally other than Lamentis, Lamentis also gains [[10%]] of that buff.
